title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Carrot, Unknown person #2, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #3 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell do you mean "We're done for"?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that thing Swallows us up, we're done for! #mongdono

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We can't! We don't have enough Cola!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all you did to keep us alive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait wait wait wait wait wait wait wait! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on a minute, Mama! At this rate, you're gonna sink the cake, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're crazy! How do you ex- PECT to control this entire ship with just that one sail!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A strong wind should come from the south, soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are you trying to do, jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?! You're going to steer this ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're going to the green room!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: «Are you more the hell is that?! Why are you turning us back towards the wave, jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way... You can't surf this thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get it now! The "Green Room" is heaven, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doc- Toooooor! Looks like I'm finally coming for you!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
